charter.mission: Generate bounded promotion-evidence targets for current provisional context features by identifying the minimum new evidence required to change retained-feature promotion judgment without promoting or integrating any feature now.
out_of_scope: new wide replay or refresh expansion
success_criteria: identify explicit promotion shortfalls for current provisional candidates
define the minimum lawful evidence paths that could change promotion judgment
close the phase with a clear continue-waiting or evidence-generation-entry posture
stop_criteria: if promotion-evidence design drifts into direct promotion or integration
if current provisional features lack enough bounded definition to state concrete evidence gaps
if no admissible new evidence path can be defined without violating current guardrails
charter.handoff_condition: After the charter opens, only replay-independent promotion-evidence artifacts are allowed until a bounded evidence-generation entry is explicit.

interpretation: V1.6 already answered whether current provisional candidates remain alive under bounded stability review.
The next lawful question is not another stability loop, but what new evidence would be required to change promotion judgment.
So V1.7 should open as a bounded promotion-evidence generation phase, not as a promotion, integration, or local-model phase.
